name: Powerplay Whitsundays Adventure
description: Experience the Whitsundays in luxury aboard Powerplay, one of the most lavish vessels in the fleet. This first-class adventure is perfect for those seeking an exclusive and exhilarating exploration of the bold scenery of the Whitsundays. With incredible features and activities, Powerplay offers a unique blend of comfort and adventure, ideal for couples, families, and thrill-seekers alike.

Incredible features and activities

Explore the bold scenery of the Whitsundays

name: Powerplay 2D/2N - Outer Reef & Extended Sails
description: Embark on a thrilling 3-night adventure to the Outer Great Barrier Reef, where you'll experience the ultimate blend of relaxation and exploration. This tour is perfect for adventure seekers and nature lovers who want to dive into the vibrant marine life and pristine waters of the reef. Enjoy extended sails, allowing you to soak in the stunning views and sunsets. Ideal for those who appreciate the beauty of the ocean and seek a unique, immersive experience.

includes:
Shared saloon accommodation
Shared double accommodation (requires 2 people)
highlights:
Explore the Outer Great Barrier Reef
Extended sails for maximum relaxation
Snorkeling and scuba diving opportunities
Stunning ocean views and sunsets
Ideal for adventure seekers and nature lovers

name: Powerplay 3D/3N - Outer Reef & Extended Sails
description: Embark on a breathtaking journey through the Whitsundays and the Outer Great Barrier Reef with our unique 3-night sailing adventure. This tour offers an unparalleled exploration of pristine reefs and stunning marine life, perfect for adventure seekers and nature lovers. Experience the thrill of sailing, snorkeling, and diving in one of the world's most beautiful natural wonders. Ideal for those looking to immerse themselves in the beauty of the ocean and enjoy the serenity of the open sea.
